meta.title: Diana Furchtgott-Roth Featured on C-SPAN Following Economic Roundtable
meta.description: Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Diana Furchtgott-Roth participated in an economic roundtable on Capitol Hill on December 3, 2009 at the request of House Republican Leader John Boehner (R-OH). Job threatening policies moving through Congress were the main topic at the roundtable.
